spec.name: The East Entrance To The Coliseum
spec.description: You are standing at the east entrance to the Coliseum. There are people everywhere, apparently in a mad rush to get in. A statue of Tiberius, an Emperor of a time long since passed, stands here looking out over the crowd. There is a passage to the north, the ticket booth is to the south and a gate opening to the city lies to the east.

north.description: You see rows upon rows of dilapidated wooden bleachers.

south.description: There are VERY long lines standing outside the ticket booth.

east.description: Nero Drive lies in that direction.

extra_descs.description: The statue of Tiberius, made of iron, stands here.
